name: node-server
description: Generic dev-server template. Spawns a long-lived node script via the managed-process environment plugin and registers it under <handle-name> so it survives this plan and is reclaimable via 'bankai stop <handle-name>'. The wait step blocks until a TCP port responds, then the plan exits with the server still running. Replace command/args/port/handle-name. Stop later with 'bankai stop <handle-name>'.
